name: Pineapple Bread Pudding
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. In a large bowl, whisk together the eggs, sugar, butter, and vanilla extract until well combined.
3. Gradually add the remaining ingredients (milk, crushed pineapple with juice, and bread) to the egg mixture. Stir until all components are evenly incorporated.
4. Pour the batter into a greased 13x9 inch baking dish.
5. Bake in the preheated oven for 45 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
